description_long: This house features a modern, angular layout with a mix of flat and slightly sloped roof sections, and is clad in gray brickwork. Large rectangular windows are distributed across all sides, providing ample natural light to the interior. The structure includes a prominent multi-car garage with three doors, and a wide driveway extending from the front. The main entryway is set back, with a modest overhang and a simple, functional design. The building's footprint is irregular, with several protruding sections and a bay window visible on one side. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with clean lines and minimal decorative elements.
description: A modern, gray-brick house with large windows, flat roof sections, and a multi-car garage. The design is angular and contemporary, with a wide driveway and minimal ornamentation.
description_view_0: This view shows the side and partial rear of the house, highlighting the gray brick facade, multiple windows, and the driveway leading to the garage.
description_view_1: The rear view reveals the back entrance, more windows, and the angular layout of the house, with the garage partially visible on the right.
description_view_2: This side view emphasizes the long stretch of windows and the irregular, protruding sections of the house, with the driveway extending away from the building.
description_view_3: The front view displays the three-car garage, main entryway, and a prominent bay window, with the wide driveway leading up to the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows and a bay window
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a simple overhang, no porch, and minimal decorative elements
